CRANK_RUNTIME_002 — turn exceeded timeout.

Wall-clock timeout (default 1s) reached during a traced turn. The worker
is killed and `{:resource_exhausted, :timeout, partial_trace}` returned.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/purity_trace_test.exs — the SlowMachine timeout test.
- test/crank/property_test_test.exs — Crank.PropertyTestTest.SlowMachine
  asserts the AssertionError message includes CRANK_RUNTIME_002.
